name: Azure AI Search Upsert
description: This process involves indexing document embeddings into Azure AI Search for efficient vector-based similarity search and retrieval.
input: It may take in Dataframe as an input
output: Save data to Azure AI Search Index

fields.name: azureSearchConnection
fields.title: Select Azure AI Search Connection
fields.description: Select the configured Azure AI Search connection that provides endpoint and API key.

fields.name: idCol
fields.title: ID Column
fields.description: Column containing a unique identifier for each document or chunk. Used as the primary key in Azure AI Search.

fields.name: contentCol
fields.title: Select Content Column
fields.description: Column containing the original text or document content to be indexed in Azure AI Search.

fields.name: embeddingCol
fields.title: Select Embeddings Column
fields.description: Column containing vector embeddings to be stored in Azure AI Search. Must match the configured vector dimensions.

fields.name: indexName
fields.title: Index Name
fields.description: Name of the Azure AI Search index where embeddings will be stored. If the index does not exist, it will be created automatically.

fields.name: namespace
fields.title: Namespace
fields.description: Optional logical namespace used to segment or version indexed documents.

fields.name: dimension
fields.title: Dimensions
fields.description: Dimensionality of the embedding vectors. Must exactly match the embedding model used.

fields.name: algorithm
fields.title: Vector Algorithm
fields.description: Vector indexing algorithm used by Azure AI Search.

fields.name: upsertMode
fields.title: Upsert Mode
fields.description: Defines how documents are written. Merge updates existing records, overwrite replaces them.

fields.name: metadataCols
fields.title: Metadata Columns
fields.description: Optional columns to store as metadata alongside each vector (e.g. title, source, page, category).
